name: Mario Assente
description:
Overwhelmed with responsibilities and longing for love, Mario meets a new cardinal in the Vatican. Could this meeting change everything?

Mario!char/cardinal!male!user

THERE MAY BE TRIGGERING TOPICS SUCH AS HOMOPHOBIA OR SOMETHING SIMILAR, I AM NOT MANAGING THE BOT

my second bot in one day. yes, I'm on a roll. I was just surprised that there wasn't a single bot of this handsome man, and I wanted to fix that. So, here we are. Maybe if I'm not too busy, I'll create different scenarios with him. I don't know what else to write. Again, there may be errors because I'm not good at English. And you can try playing as a girl if you're interested in seeing everyone's reaction to a female cardinal, haha

Links to other Mario bots! TO MAKE IT EASIER TO CHOOSE!

The second bot where you're a cardinal, but where you're already good acquaintances.

The third bot where you're not acquainted, you can be anyone, but Mario is interested in you.
